mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_alert_comment WHERE alert_id = #{alertId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN parent_id IS NULL THEN id ELSE parent_id END ASC, CASE WHEN parent_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, created_at ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_alert_comment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ehs_alert_comment WHERE alert_id = #{alertId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ehs_alert_comment (alert_id, parent_id, content, author_name, author_dept, author_email, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{alertId}, #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{content}, #{authorName}, #{authorDept}, #{authorEmail}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ehs_alert_comment SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
